title: Production proof gate: validate settlement, CLV, P&L, and correction analytics

correction.notes: correction: actual Panarin powerPlay_goals+assists = 1 > 0.5 line — OVER wins

correction_chain_validation.invariant_verified: corrects_id FK to original; original row unmodified; correction is additive

clv_validation.root_cause: All 90 settled picks are smart-form/canary-proof/api source. CLV join path (picks → pick_candidates → market_universe) only resolves for board-construction picks. Scanner quiesced (DEBT-003) means zero board-construction picks have entered settlement.
clv_validation.data_readiness: Closing line data exists in market_universe (76.3%). CLV proof is unblocked the moment scanner re-enable produces board-construction picks through settlement.

pnl_validation.root_cause: stake_units is NULL on all settled picks (smart-form and canary-proof submissions do not carry a stake value). P&L computation requires stake_units × result multiplier. This will resolve when board-construction picks (which carry model-driven stake) enter settlement.
pnl_validation.note: ROI calculation also blocked for same reason.

market_universe_health.verdict: HEALTHY — closing line data is populated and available for CLV once board-construction picks settle

DEBT-003.description: system-pick-scanner intentionally quiesced; PM decision required to re-enable
DEBT-003.action_required: PM decision to re-enable scanner. Once board-construction picks flow through settlement, CLV + P&L proof completes with no further code changes.

acceptance_criteria_check.settlement_records_match_source_truth: PASS — 91 records, all result+confidence populated, grading-service settler
acceptance_criteria_check.clv_reconciles_to_closing_data: BLOCKED — DEBT-003 (no board-construction picks in settlement)
acceptance_criteria_check.pnl_roi_reconciles_to_settlement_and_sta: BLOCKED — stake_units null on smart-form picks
acceptance_criteria_check.correction_chains_preserve_immutable_his: PASS — 1 correction proven, original row immutable

open_actions: PM decision to re-enable system-pick-scanner (DEBT-003) — all preconditions met
Once board-construction picks settle: re-run CLV and P&L proof queries (no code changes needed)
